title: Are there any javascript tools to view excel data parsed by exceljs in web page？prefer open source.
author: hyfbeetle
body: Are there any javascript tools to view excel data parsed by exceljs in web page？prefer open source.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: To view the data source parsed by exceljs, you should be able to use the debug of the IDE, such as using the debug function of VSCode
